name: task-harness
description: The full harness for a substantial task: chainable, independently invocable skills covering one lifecycle with two execution modes. Plan the work into letter groups, then execute it in-session (task-execution) or by delegation (mastermind-role, user-invoked: the main context reserves itself for reasoning and dispatches a four-tier fleet of committing delegate workers), and run a multi-agent quality gate over the resulting diff. The gate fans out up to ten read-only review angles through a dynamic Workflow — backed by twelve agents including the adversarial verifier and gap sweeper — and returns adversarially verified findings.
